title: THE DELTA RUNE
description: A DELTARUNE mod for Minecraft. Previously known as Minecraft: 5th Dimensional.
body:
This is a fan-made DELTARUNE mod for Minecraft. It includes 4 Dark worlds, 2 that are still in progress but are still accessible, 46 new blocks, ~13 new items, etc.

To access:
- The Field of Hopes and Dreams: Create a dark fountain on 2 stacked blocks of purple or red concrete.
- The Field of Pink and Gold: Create a dark fountain on 2 stacked blocks of cherry planks.
- The Field of Lost Hopes and Forgotten Dreams: Create a dark fountain on two stacked blocks of green concrete.
- Lost World: Create a dark fountain on two stacked blocks of cyan wool.
[WIP]:
- WATERWORLD: Create a dark fountain on sand, sandstone, or water (if possible).
- The Failed Sanctuary: Create a dark fountain on dark oak planks.

(With many more on the way!)


[OLD Desc.] "This is a DLC of sorts for a previous mod I created: Minecraft 4th Dimensional.  It includes, of course, the 5th Dimension, as well (at the time of writing this) 7 new blocks, 2 new items, and 1 whole new dimension. Currently, the mod is in testing, but soon it will be in full release!"
